articles.author: Paul-Alain Hunt
articles.title: More Iranian Women Soccer Players Reverse Australia Asylum Claim - Bloomberg
articles.description: Three more members of the Iranian women’s soccer team granted asylum by Australia last week have decided to return to Iran, according to Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke.
articles.content:
Three more members of the Iranian womens soccer team granted asylum by Australia last week have decided to return to Iran, according to Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke.
